title: A Resolution Commending and Congratulating the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Headed by Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino, Through the Efforts of Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction Management Office (MDRRMO) Headed by Ms. Cynthia N. Quintans for Being Adjudged by the National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (NDRRMC) Thru the National Gawad Kalasag Selection Committee (NGKC) As Fully Compliant Local Government Unit LGU) for the 22nd Gawad Kalasag Seal for Excellence in
